notFoundDescription: The requested vendor could not be found.

coBidding.title: Co-Bidding Pattern Detected
coBidding.description: This vendor frequently appears in the same procedures with specific partners.
coBidding.noPatternsDescription: Requires ≥3 shared competitive procedures with another vendor
coBidding.heuristicNote: This is a separate heuristic analysis. The v0.6.5 ML risk score assigns co_bid_rate a coefficient of 0.000 — co-bidding patterns did not discriminate corrupt from clean vendors in the training data and do not contribute to the displayed risk score.

criticalAlert.efosDefinitivoTitle: SAT EFOS Definitivo — Confirmed ghost company under Art. 69-B Mexican Tax Code
criticalAlert.efosDefinitivoBody: The Mexican Tax Authority (SAT) has formally confirmed this entity engages in non-existent transactions. Contracts may be fraudulent.
criticalAlert.groundTruthTitle: Documented in {{count}} corruption case(s) in RUBLI ground truth
criticalAlert.groundTruthBody: Statistical patterns in this vendor's procurement history match documented corruption cases.

cards.institutionalRelationshipsNote: Long-tenured vendor relationships correlate with higher single-bid rates and prices (Coviello & Gagliarducci 2017)
cards.procurementFootprintNote: Sector × institution relationships, sized by total value
cards.footprintLegend: Color = sector · badge = avg risk score · sorted by total value

risk.sortByRisk: Sort by risk and go to highest
risk.counterfactualSubtitle: Estimated score if each factor were at sector average (z=0).
risk.counterfactualFootnote: Simulation based on model v0.6.5 (PU c={{c}}, intercept={{intercept}})
risk.loadAnalysisHint: Click "Load analysis" to fetch AI-generated pattern insights for this vendor.
risk.couldNotLoad: Could not load this section. Try refreshing.
risk.noPatternInsights: No pattern insights available for this vendor.
risk.couldNotLoadPeerComparison: Could not load peer comparison data. Try refreshing.
risk.fingerprintSubtitle: Unique risk signature · Area proportional to each factor's SHAP contribution
risk.fingerprintLegend: Red petals = risk factors · Blue petals = protective factors · Area proportional to SHAP value

history.calendarDescription: Contract activity over the last 5 years. Darker cells indicate more contracts in that month.
history.noCalendarData: No contract date data available for calendar view.
history.noMatchFilters: No contracts match the current filters.

network.networkGraphDescription: Explore the full vendor relationship network with interactive graph visualization.
network.highClustering: High clustering — tightly connected bidding group
network.highClusteringAlert: High network clustering detected. This vendor's bidding partners form a tightly connected group. See co-bidding patterns below.
network.roleDecoy: 🔴 Cover bidder — bids but rarely wins
network.roleAccomplice: 🟡 Frequent co-winner — both win frequently together

flags.highDirectAward: {{pct}}% of contracts were direct awards (bypassed competitive tendering)
flags.highSingleBid: {{pct}}% of competitive procedures had only this vendor bidding
flags.suspiciousCoBidding: Notable co-bidding patterns detected (heuristic analysis — not included in the v0.6.5 ML risk score, which assigns co_bid_rate a coefficient of 0.000)
flags.highClustering: High network clustering ({{pct}}%) — bidding partners form a tightly-knit group
flags.primaryDriver: Primary driver: {{factor}} (z={{z}} — {{z}} SDs above sector average)
flags.disclaimer: Flags are statistical risk indicators, not proof of wrongdoing. Use for investigation triage only.

waterfall.description: Positive bars increase risk (red/orange). Negative bars reduce risk (green). Bar height reflects each factor's contribution to the overall score.

riskSentence.highDirectAward: {{name}} bypasses competitive bidding on {{pct}}% of contracts — {{multiple}}× the national average of 35%.
riskSentence.highSingleBid: {{name}} wins {{pct}}% of competitive bids unopposed — a single-bidder pattern consistent with market capture.
riskSentence.highRiskPattern: {{name}} shows procurement patterns that closely resemble {{count}} documented corruption cases in the RUBLI ground truth database.

scaleSentence.highValue: Total contract value of {{amount}} places it among Mexico's highest-value government suppliers.
scaleSentence.highCount: {{total}} contracts over its procurement history suggests deep institutional relationships.

priceVolatility.title: Price Volatility
priceVolatility.description: This vendor's contract amounts vary significantly more than sector peers — the strongest statistical signal in the v0.6.5 model.

ghostRisk.title: Ghost Company Risk
ghostRisk.description: This vendor shows structural patterns consistent with ghost companies: new, minimal activity, concentrated awards.

yearEnd.title: Year-End Concentration
yearEnd.description: December contracts bypass normal review cycles — a timing anomaly associated with budget dumping.

protectiveFactors.title: Protective Factors
protectiveFactors.description: These factors lower the risk score — the model treats them as signals of legitimate operations.

histogram.title: Contract Size Distribution
histogram.description: 3M MXN threshold marks the single-tender limit. Clusters just below the line may indicate threshold splitting.

externalRecords.confirmedGhostCompany: CRITICAL: Vendor confirmed on SAT Art. 69-B ghost company list
externalRecords.noSfpSanctions: No SFP sanctions — external records available
externalRecords.noExternalRecords: No external records found for this vendor
externalRecords.sourceNote: Sources: SFP Proveedores Sancionados · RUPC Vendor Registry · ASF Audit Findings · SAT Art. 69-B EFOS
externalRecords.asfNotFound: No ASF audit findings on record. ASF data coverage is limited to scraped records.
externalRecords.efosNotFound: Not found on SAT Art. 69-B EFOS/EDOS ghost company list.
externalRecords.efosConfirmed: Confirmed ghost company — invoices from this vendor are confirmed to simulate operations under Art. 69-B CFF.
externalRecords.efosPresunto: Under review as presumed ghost company (Art. 69-B CFF).
externalRecords.efosFavorecido: Received invoices from a confirmed ghost company.
externalRecords.qqwOfficials: Procurement officials who signed contracts with this vendor (from QQW dataset):
externalRecords.qqwContracts: Recent contracts in QQW dataset ({{count}} total):
externalRecords.dataSourceNote: External data is loaded from public registries and may be incomplete. SFP sanctions and RUPC data must be refreshed manually via backend scripts. ASF coverage depends on web scraping availability. SAT Art. 69-B list updated monthly via scripts/load_sat_efos.py. QQW data fetched via scripts/fetch_qqw_data.py (top 200 high-risk vendors).

aria.notInQueue: This vendor is not in the ARIA investigation queue.
aria.notInQueueNote: Only vendors with a significant IPS score appear here.

groundTruthBanner.appearsIn: This vendor appears in {{count}} documented procurement irregularity case(s)
groundTruthBanner.trainingSetNote: This vendor is part of RUBLI's ground truth training set — contracts matching documented corruption patterns.

groupTitle: This vendor belongs to a related network group
vendorGroupTooltip: This vendor belongs to a related network group
